title: 56-79 PCS Bike Tyre Puncture Repair Kit with Self-Adhesive Patches, Glue, Tyre Levers, Portable Storage Case for Road, Mountain, Commuter Bikes & Motorcycles
features: 【Complete Bicycle Puncture Repair Kit】：This all-in-one puncture repair kit bicycle set contains 10 round patches, 16 round patches, 6 rectangular patches, 6 self-adhesive tyre patches, 2 strong metal tyre levers, 4 metal foils, 4 rubber hoses, 3 glues, 2 tyre repair tools, 1 accessory box, and a marker pen. Everything you need in a bike puncture repair kit to fix your tyres quickly and effectively.

【Versatile Combinations for All Tyres】：Designed as a cycle puncture repair kit, it comes in 2 sizes to handle both small and large holes. Whether it’s a motorcycle puncture repair kit, motorbike puncture repair kit, or a bicycle tyre repair kit, you can count on it to restore your tyre like new, no matter if it’s pierced by glass, nails, or other sharp objects.

【Quick Glueless Instant Repair】：With self-adhesive patches included in the bike tyre repair kit, you can repair your tube without glue. These patches are suitable for temporary fixes during emergencies, allowing you to continue your ride instantly. For permanent repairs, rely on the vulcanising puncture repair patches included in this inner tube repair kit.

【Portable & Lightweight Design】：This tyre puncture repair kit weighs only 120 g and comes in a compact box, making it easy to carry on cycling trips. Perfect for storing in a frame bag or backpack, this bicycle repair kit ensures you’re always prepared for unexpected tyre issues during mountain biking, road cycling, or commuting.

【Wide Applications Beyond Bikes】：More than just a bicycle puncture repair kit, this set is practical for repairing inflatables such as air mattresses, dinghies, and paddling pools. Whether you need a bike repair kit for your bicycle, a puncture repair kit bike tyre for your BMX, or tools for ATVs and wheelchairs, this versatile kit covers it all.
description: Package includes: Pack of 16 - round patches. Pack of 10 round vulcanising patches. 6pcs-square patches Pack of 6 self-adhesive tyre patches. Pack of 2 metal tyre levers. 4 Pack - Metallic Foil Pack of 4 - rubber hose. Pack of 2 - tyre repair. 1 x accessory box. 1 x marker pen. How to use vulcanised tyre patches? 1. Polish the edge of the broken hole. 2. Grind until the rough surface is larger than the patch area. 3. Clean and apply glue evenly. 4. Apply half a drop of glue and distribute evenly. 5. Wait 2-3 minutes for the glue to dry. 6. Cover the patch completely with the broken hole. 7. Apply firm pressure on each part of the plaster. 8. Wait 10 minutes for the patch and tyre to meld. 9. Remove the film and the tyres are ready to inflate. How to use glueless self-adhesive patches? 1. Polish the edge of the broken hole. The roughened surfaces must be larger than a patch. 2. Stick the glueless self-adhesive patch after cleaning the surfaces. 3. Press for one minute. Press firmly from the middle several times, and press the edge area firmly. 4.5 minutes, the hose can be inflated. After sale warranty: If you have any questions about the bicycle tyre repair kit, please contact us in time, we will solve your questions as soon as possible.
